plugin.name: wm-actions
plugin._long: A plugin which provides various window management functionalities and IPC methods for window and mouse control.

option.name: toggle_always_on_top
option._long: Toggle the always-on-top state of a view.

option.name: toggle_fullscreen
option._long: Toggle the fullscreen state of a view.

option.name: toggle_sticky
option._long: Toggle the sticky state of a view.

option.name: toggle_maximize
option._long: Toggle the maximize state of the active view.

option.name: send_to_back
option._long: Send the active view to behind all other views.

option.name: bring_to_front
option._long: Raise the active view above all other views.

group._long: Methods available via the IPC interface for programmatic window and mouse control.

method.name: wm-actions/maximize
method._long: Toggles the maximized state of a view.
method.param: ID of the view to maximize/unmaximize
True to maximize, false to unmaximize

method.name: wm-actions/close
method.param: ID of the view to close

method.name: wm-actions/move
method._long: Moves a view to the specified position.
method.param: ID of the view to move
Whether to animate the move (default: true)

method.name: wm-actions/resize
method._long: Resizes a view to the specified dimensions.
method.param: ID of the view to resize
Whether to animate the resize (default: true)

method.name: wm-actions/get-geometry
method._long: Returns the geometry and state of a view.

method.name: wm-actions/set-geometry
method._long: Sets the exact geometry of a view.

method.name: wm-actions/focus
method._long: Focuses and raises the specified view.
method.param: ID of the view to focus

method.name: wm-actions/set-minimized
method._long: Toggles the minimized state of a view.
method.param: True to minimize, false to restore

method.name: wm-actions/set-always-on-top
method._long: Sets the always-on-top state of a view.

method.name: wm-actions/set-fullscreen
method._long: Sets the fullscreen state of a view.

method.name: wm-actions/set-sticky
method._long: Sets the sticky state of a view (visible on all workspaces).

method.name: wm-actions/send-to-back
method._long: Sends the view behind all other views.

method.name: wm-actions/bring-to-front
method._long: Brings the view to the front of the stack.

method.name: input/get-cursor-position
method._long: Returns the current cursor position in global coordinates.

method.name: input/warp-cursor
method._long: Moves the cursor to the specified position.
